data.title: Implement ticket dedup, creation, and advisory output
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Description
Add _dm_create_tickets() and hook_directory_size_monitor() to plugins/dso/hooks/lib/directory-monitor.sh.

_dm_create_tickets():
- For each oversized directory from _dm_scan_directories(), query ticket list for open tickets with tag dir:<normalized-path>
- If no open ticket found, create a P4 epic: ticket create epic "Refactor: split <dir> into subdirectories" -p 4 --tags "dir:<path>"
- Collect results for advisory output

hook_directory_size_monitor():
- Main entry point called by session-start dispatcher
- Calls _dm_scan_directories() then _dm_create_tickets()
- Prints advisory summary of flagged directories to stderr
- Always returns 0 (non-blocking)
- Graceful degradation: if ticket CLI fails, log warning and continue

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] hook_directory_size_monitor function is defined and sourceable
  Verify: bash -c 'source plugins/dso/hooks/lib/directory-monitor.sh && type hook_directory_size_monitor'
- [ ] Dedup tests from Task 3 pass (create-when-none, skip-when-open, create-when-closed)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-directory-monitor.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'PASS\|ok'
- [ ] Advisory output goes to stderr (not stdout)
  Verify: grep -q 'stderr\|>&2\|1>&2' plugins/dso/hooks/lib/directory-monitor.sh
- [ ] Function always returns 0
  Verify: grep -q 'return 0' plugins/dso/hooks/lib/directory-monitor.sh
- [ ] Tags created tickets with dir:<path> format
  Verify: grep -q 'dir:' plugins/dso/hooks/lib/directory-monitor.sh
